title: June 6, 2024
summary: A brief discussion about historical accounts of unidentified aerial phenomena across different cultures and time periods, suggesting that UFO sightings are not a modern phenomenon. The speaker references ancient texts and medieval accounts as evidence of long-standing encounters with unexplained objects in the sky.

key_claims.claim: There is documentation of strange things in the sky going back a long time, suggesting UFO phenomena are not necessarily modern
The Book of Enoch is basically an alien abduction story
